Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER is performed after Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants where the process includes a re-submission loop initiated by Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE occurs

Name: Time until Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that originate from the same case:DeclarationNumber as a prior Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in high-frequency variants (frequency > 100)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in similar process paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION occurs
